ctaBanner.subtitle: Need a notarial deed or legal advice? We invite you to our office.
faq.items.0.answer: To have a notarial deed drawn up, please contact the office by phone or in person to schedule an appointment. The notary will inform you about the required documents and approximate costs of the procedure.
faq.items.1.answer: The costs of notarial acts are regulated by the Regulation of the Minister of Justice on maximum notarial fee rates. The notary adds 23% VAT to the fee. Detailed costs are determined individually after reviewing the type of act.
faq.items.2.answer: To draw up a notarial deed for the sale of real estate, the following documents are required, among others: identity documents of the parties, land and mortgage register extract, basis of acquisition, certificate of no tax arrears, certificate from the cooperative or community, and land registry extract.
faq.items.3.answer: A deed of certification of inheritance (APD) is an alternative to a court declaration of inheritance acquisition. It is drawn up before a notary with the participation of all heirs and registered in a nationwide register. The procedure is faster than court proceedings.
faq.items.4.answer: Yes, in special circumstances the notary may perform acts outside the office, e.g. in a hospital or at the client's home, when a person involved in the act cannot appear in person due to health reasons. Conditions are determined individually.

about.story.content:
The Notary Office of Aleksandra Durys was established in July 2016. The office is located in the center of Garwolin, at ul. Nadwodna 21, near state and local government offices, which provides additional convenience for clients.

We offer professional service in performing notarial acts, in accordance with applicable law and the professional ethics of notaries. The office specializes in real estate transactions, inheritance matters, certifications, and preparation of company agreements.

Trust our professionalism and experience — we ensure the legal security of every transaction.
home.about.subtitle: The Notary Office of Aleksandra Durys in Garwolin provides professional notarial services. We guarantee an individual approach to each client, legal security of transactions, and timely completion of entrusted matters.

about.jurisdiction.content:
The Notary Office of Aleksandra Durys provides a full range of notarial services as provided for in the Act of 14 February 1991 — the Law on Notaries. As a person of public trust, the notary ensures the correctness and legal security of all performed acts.

In accordance with Article 79 of the Law on Notaries, the notary performs the following acts: draws up notarial deeds, deeds of certification of inheritance, undertakes activities regarding the European Certificate of Succession, prepares certifications, delivers declarations, draws up minutes, prepares protests of bills of exchange and cheques, accepts documents and money for deposit, and prepares certified copies, excerpts and extracts of documents as well as drafts of deeds and declarations.

The office serves individual clients, entrepreneurs, cooperatives, housing communities, and institutions from the Garwolin area and surroundings, including the Garwolin district.

features.items.0.description: Electronic land and mortgage register system enabling the submission of land registry applications electronically directly from the notary office.
features.items.1.description: Central Register of Wills — a nationwide register enabling the search for information about registered wills.
features.items.2.description: Electronic Platform for Public Administration Services enabling electronic communication with government offices.
features.items.3.description: IT system of the National Notarial Council supporting the handling of notarial acts and deed registration.
features.items.4.description: National Court Register — electronic access to data of entities registered in the register.
features.items.5.description: Central Register and Information on Economic Activity — verification of entrepreneur data.
features.items.6.description: REGON register maintained by the Central Statistical Office — verification of business entities and their statistical data.
features.items.7.description: System for comprehensive management of the notary office and registration of acts.
footer.columns.contact.title: Contact
services.items.0.description: Drawing up notarial deeds concerning real estate transactions, donations, preliminary agreements, and other legal acts.
services.items.1.description: Drawing up deeds of certification of inheritance — a fast alternative to court declaration of inheritance acquisition.
services.items.2.description: Notarial certification of signatures, conformity of copies with originals, and dates of document presentation.
services.items.3.description: Drawing up powers of attorney in the form of notarial deeds and accepting and registering wills.
services.items.4.description: Drawing up agreements for civil partnerships, general partnerships, limited partnerships, and limited liability companies.
services.items.5.description: Accepting money, securities, and documents for safekeeping as part of notarial deposit.
contact.info.notice.description: Notarial act costs include the notarial fee (+ 23% VAT), civil law transaction tax, inheritance and donation tax, and court fees. Detailed pricing after reviewing the matter.
about.career.items.0.description: As the owner and head of the Notary Office in Garwolin, I provide professional notarial services for individual clients and entrepreneurs. I specialize in real estate transactions, inheritance matters, and certifications.
about.career.items.1.description: At a Warsaw notary office, I gained comprehensive experience in drawing up notarial deeds, handling real estate market transactions, and preparing corporate documentation for commercial law companies.
about.career.items.2.description: I completed the notarial training program under the supervision of experienced notaries, gaining practical knowledge in civil, commercial, and land registry law. The training was completed by passing the notarial examination.

services.items.0.fullDescription: Drawing up notarial deeds concerning real estate transactions, donations, preliminary agreements, life estate agreements, and other legal acts requiring the form of a notarial deed.
services.items.1.fullDescription: Drawing up deeds of certification of inheritance (APD) — a fast and convenient alternative to court declaration of inheritance acquisition. Registration in the nationwide register.
services.items.2.fullDescription: Notarial certification of signatures, conformity of copies with originals, dates of document presentation, and proof that a person is alive.
services.items.3.fullDescription: Drawing up powers of attorney in the form of notarial deeds and accepting and registering notarial wills in the Notarial Register of Wills.
services.items.4.fullDescription: Drawing up agreements for civil partnerships, general partnerships, limited partnerships, and limited liability companies, as well as amendments to company agreements and articles of association.
services.items.5.fullDescription: Accepting money, securities, and documents for safekeeping as part of notarial deposit, ensuring transaction security.
testimonials.items.0.description: Notary Durys professionally handled the entire apartment purchase transaction. Everything was explained in an accessible manner and the documents were prepared on time. Highly recommended.
testimonials.items.1.description: The office helped us prepare the company agreement and handle the formalities related to registration. Professional approach and fast execution.
testimonials.items.2.description: Efficient and hassle-free handling of the inheritance certification. The Notary patiently explained the entire process and helped gather the necessary documents.
